stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
According to NOTAM A8236/14, on the 30th December 2014, taxiway C was closed between taxiways CD and CL. In addition

options.a: taxiway closures did not affect VFR traffic.
options.b: taxiway C was available 60 minutes prior to night.
options.c: taxiways CD and CL were operational.
options.d: taxiways CD and CL were closed as well.
